title: Vanilla Plus Plus
description: Modpack for a small community server
body: This is a modpack for a small semi private community server. It focuses mostly on optimization, quality of life mods and the Create mod as its main technology mod. This modpack is a modified fork of Fabulously Optimized. The Fabulously Optimized modpack focuses on optimization and only contains mods that improve performance without any content or quality of life mods. The following mods are added on top of the mods included in Fabulously Optimized (28): - Advancement Info - Apple Skin - Backpacked - Bits and Chisels - CC: Tweaked - Craft Tweaker - Create - Create Crafts & Additions - Create Goggles - Distant Horizons - Elytra Slot - Enchantment Descriptions - Jade - Journey Map - Just Enough Items - Just Enough Resources - Mouse Tweaks - Natures Compass - Some library mods required by the mods above The following mods are included in the Fabulously Optimized modpack (47): - Animatica - Better Beds - Better Mount HUD - Borderless Mining - CIT Resewn - Capes - Chat Reporting Helper - Cloth Config API - Continuity - Controlify - Debugify - Dynamic FPS - Entity Culling - Fabric API - Fabric Language Kotlin - FabricSkyBoxes Interop - FabricSkyboxes - Fabricshot - Fadeless - Fast Better Grass - FastQuit - FerriteCore - ImmediatelyFast - Indium - Iris Shaders - LambDynamicLights - LanguageReload - Lithium - Main Menu Credits - MixinTrace - Mod Menu - Mod Menu Helper.zip - Model Gap Fix - ModernFix - More Chat History - More Culling - No Chat Reports - OptiGUI - Paginated Advancements & Custom Frames - Puzzle - Reese's Sodium Options - Remove Reloading Screen - Sodium - Sodium Extra - Translations for Sodium - YetAnotherConfigLib - Your Options Shall Be Respected - Zoomify - Entity Model Features - Entity Texture Features - e4mc
